2605.28683.title: VeriTrip: A Verifiable Benchmark for Travel Planning Agents over Unstructured Web Corpora
2605.28683.paper_summary: Existing benchmarks have laid the foundation for travel planning agents by establishing API-centric paradigms. However, as the capabilities of Autonomous Agents continue to advance, their evaluation must evolve beyond simple tool execution toward handling the inherent complexities of the open web. Current benchmarks bypass core cognitive hurdles: they fail to account for information noise, ignore multi-source factual contradictions, and overlook the necessity of grounding visual perception into logical planning. We introduce VeriTrip, a verifiable benchmark designed to meet the increasing demands for agent robustness and reliability. VeriTrip shifts the evaluation focus to evidence-grounded reasoning over unstructured multimodal web corpora. It establishes a Multimodal Retrieval Base (MRB) derived from real-world sources, forcing agents to autonomously orchestrate queries across heterogeneous data. A synchronized Verifiable Knowledge Base (VKB) enables a cell-wise verification protocol that precisely quantifies factual reliability, distinguishing systematic reasoning failures from parametric hallucinations. Our evaluations across leading MLLMs reveal a critical \textit{retrieval-reasoning trade-off}: the cognitive load of autonomous retrieval significantly erodes instruction retention. VeriTrip provides the rigorous foundation necessary for the next generation of planning agents capable of operating in unconstrained, multimodal environments.
2605.28683.paper_summary_zh: 現有的基準已為旅行規劃代理奠定了基礎，通過建立以 API 為中心的範式。<lb/>然而，隨著自主代理能力的不斷提升，它們的評估必須超越簡單的工具執行，轉向處理開放網絡固有的複雜性。<lb/>當前的基準忽略了核心的認知障礙：它們未能考慮信息噪聲，忽視多來源事實矛盾，並且忽略了將視覺感知根植於邏輯規劃的必要性。<lb/>我們介紹了 VeriTrip，一個旨在滿足對代理穩健性和可靠性日益增長需求的可驗證基準。<lb/>VeriTrip 將評估重點轉向基於證據的推理，針對非結構化的多模態網絡語料庫。<lb/>它建立了一個源自現實世界的多模態檢索庫 (MRB)，迫使代理在異質數據中自主協調查詢。<lb/>一個同步的可驗證知識庫 (VKB) 使得細胞級驗證協議成為可能，精確量化事實可靠性，區分系統性推理失敗與參數性幻覺。<lb/>我們在領先的 MLLMs 上的評估揭示了一個關鍵的 \textit{檢索-推理權衡}：自主檢索的認知負擔顯著侵蝕指令保留。<lb/>VeriTrip 提供了下一代能夠在不受限制的多模態環境中運作的規劃代理所需的嚴謹基礎。
2605.28683.author: Yuting Xu et.al.
2605.28683.authors: Yuting Xu, Jiayi Tian, Jian Liang, Xin Xiong, Hang Zhang, Mu Xu, Xiao-Yu Zhang
